# Fetch Tools Functionality Test
# Tests fetch tools with valid public URLs

# Build the fetch server binary
go build -o mcp-fetch-server .

# Note: These tests use httpbin.org which is a reliable testing service
# If it's unavailable, tests may fail but that's expected behavior
exec mcp-fetch-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_headers","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/get"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/json"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch_text","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/html"}},"id":5}
EOF

# Verify get_headers functionality
stdout '"statusCode":200'
stdout '"Content-Type"'
stdout '"Server"'

# Verify fetch functionality
stdout '"content"'
stdout '"contentType"'
stdout '"size"'
stdout '"url":"https://httpbin.org/json"'

# Verify fetch_text functionality
stdout '"text"'
stdout '"originalSize"'
stdout '"textSize"'
stdout '"url":"https://httpbin.org/html"'

# Headers should contain standard HTTP headers
stdout '"headers"'
